metadata.title: EA to MCA Migration Dashboard Sample Data
metadata.purpose: Demo-safe dashboard sample data for CSA review before real tenant wiring.
metadata.truthfulness_note: This sample distinguishes documented facts from partially documented, inferred, and pending-validation guidance.

rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Billing profile viewing is anchored to the billing profile scope; reader is the narrowest profile-level read role described in the MCA billing roles guidance.
Invoice actions are tied to billing profile invoice context, and Learn documents invoice-oriented permissions there; exact portal and API behavior still needs tenant confirmation.
rbac_tasks.uncertainty: Confirm exact invoice view/download behavior for non-owner billing roles in the customer tenant and chosen access path.

rbac_tasks.task_label: View cost reports or cost analysis
rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Reader-level scope aligns with billing visibility expectations, but specific reporting surfaces such as Power BI may require broader permission than a pure read assumption.
rbac_tasks.uncertainty: Validate the exact role needed for each reporting surface, especially Power BI connector access in the target tenant.

rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Configuration-oriented actions usually imply contributor-level rights, but the exact management boundary varies by reporting feature and should be validated before treating this as final.
rbac_tasks.uncertainty: Confirm whether the intended reporting task is portal-only, API-based, or connector-based before locking the minimum role.

rbac_tasks.task_label: Create subscription under MCA billing scope
rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Learn identifies Azure subscription creator at invoice-section scope as the least-privilege delegation for subscription creation under MCA.

rbac_tasks.task_label: View costs for one invoice section
rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Read-only at the smallest billing scope; use when cost visibility is limited to one department/project section.

rbac_tasks.task_label: View all billing data for the whole MCA account
rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Read-only at billing account scope; broad because billing-account permissions inherit to all children and cannot be removed lower.
Contributor manages everything except permissions at the invoice section scope.

rbac_tasks.task_label: Create subscription anywhere under a billing profile
rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Broader than invoice-section creator, but the narrowest role that allows creation across all sections of a billing profile.

rbac_tasks.task_label: Connect Power BI direct connector to MCA billing account/profile
rbac_tasks.least_privilege_reason: Current Power BI Learn doc requires Contributor or greater for MCA — stricter than many teams expect; validate in tenant.
rbac_tasks.uncertainty: Power BI connector permission is stricter than a reader role; confirm in the customer tenant.

api_mapping.mca_concept: Billing account, billing profile, and invoice section scopes
api_mapping.scope_change: Enrollment-based identifiers no longer map directly; automation must target MCA billing scopes.
api_mapping.breaking_change: Existing scripts that assume EA enrollment APIs or enrollment-level scope IDs will fail or produce different scope semantics.
api_mapping.migration_action: Inventory all EA-scoped API calls and replace them with MCA billing-scope-aware Billing and Cost Management API calls.

api_mapping.mca_concept: ARM-based Billing and Cost Management API usage
api_mapping.scope_change: Requests must be rebased to billingAccount, billingProfile, or invoiceSection where supported.
api_mapping.breaking_change: Hardcoded path templates and scope parsing logic from EA automation will not transfer cleanly.
api_mapping.migration_action: Refactor API clients to separate authentication from scope construction and make scope values variable-driven.

api_mapping.mca_concept: MCA hierarchy in Cost Management and Power BI
api_mapping.scope_change: Dashboard consumers must understand billing profile and invoice section segmentation instead of EA department and account structures.
api_mapping.breaking_change: Teams may misread invoice totals or cost rollups if they expect EA-era structure and scope behavior.
api_mapping.migration_action: Update dashboards, filters, and operating runbooks to explain the MCA hierarchy and invoice rollup model.
api_mapping.uncertainty: Validate exact role and field availability in the intended reporting surface before declaring parity with EA dashboards.

api_mapping.scope_change: Department-based cost grouping becomes invoice-section grouping on the billing profile invoice.
api_mapping.breaking_change: Reports/automation keyed to EA department IDs must be re-keyed to invoice section names.
api_mapping.migration_action: Map each EA department to an invoice section and update cost allocation logic.

api_mapping.mca_concept: Azure subscription creator on invoice section
api_mapping.scope_change: Delegated subscription creation moves from EA account owner to the Azure subscription creator billing role on an invoice section.
api_mapping.breaking_change: Principals relying on EA account-owner semantics or Azure RBAC alone cannot create MCA subscriptions.
api_mapping.migration_action: Grant Azure subscription creator on the target invoice section to the automation principal.

api_mapping.mca_concept: Power BI with billing account ID / billing profile ID
api_mapping.scope_change: BI connections use MCA billing account/profile IDs and manual scope selection instead of an enrollment number.
api_mapping.breaking_change: Enrollment-number BI workflows stop working; permission requirement rises to Contributor or greater.
api_mapping.migration_action: Reconfigure Power BI with MCA scope IDs and validate connector permissions.

api_mapping.mca_concept: MCA billing profile invoice + Billing API invoices endpoints
api_mapping.scope_change: Invoices are per billing profile and retrieved/downloaded via Billing REST API invoice endpoints.
api_mapping.breaking_change: Reconciliation assuming one invoice per enrollment/department must be revisited for per-billing-profile invoices.
api_mapping.migration_action: Rebuild invoice retrieval against the Billing API download endpoint, scoped to the billing profile.

hierarchy_levels.description: Top billing container for the agreement and parent of billing profiles.
Invoice and payment grouping; each billing profile generates a monthly invoice.
Cost segmentation container used within a billing profile invoice, often aligned to departments or projects.
Azure subscriptions are billed to an invoice section and their charges roll up into the parent billing profile invoice.

invoice_flow_notes.statement: A monthly invoice is generated per billing profile, not per invoice section.
Invoice sections appear as organizational cost segments within the billing profile invoice rather than as independent invoices.
Portal and API invoice access should be tenant-tested because billing-role behavior can vary by action surface and operational expectation.
invoice_flow_notes.uncertainty: Treat invoice-access automation as pending validation until tested in the customer tenant.

billing_notes.statement: EA department concepts map most closely to MCA invoice sections for cost segmentation and operational ownership.
Invoice-focused access should be treated as a billing-profile-centered capability, with exact least-privilege validation performed in tenant.
billing_notes.uncertainty: Confirm exact reader versus invoice-manager behavior for the portal and API combination used by the customer.

billing_notes.statement: Automation should accept invoice-section billing scope values as variables rather than hardcoding or inferring them.
